string.name: fs_tool_demo_note
string.value: This page is a demo entry

string.name: fs_tool_desc_web
string.value: Demo: Open any webpage in the Web container, supporting URL interception, login token passthrough, and error page recovery.

string.name: fs_tool_desc_scan
string.value: Demo: Scan enters camera preview mode (ScanKit/CameraX integration pending).

string.name: fs_tool_desc_translate
string.value: Demo: Translation will integrate Speech Kit / ML Kit (integration pending).

string.name: fs_tool_desc_file
string.value: Demo: File management will use photoAccessHelper / Storage Access Framework (integration pending).
